regions.text: Six thousand years ago in Egypt, men measured land using squares and triangles. How large is this square?
(4x4 Grid) We count small squares to find the area. There are sixteen small squares in this large square.
The area is sixteen units squared (inches, feet, or yards). The relation of side to area is always the same.
area: the measure of a surface. unit: a division of measure used as one.
